title: M' Special Recipes
description: A datapack that adds a lot of vanilla content, new spawn eggs, new recipes, new items that contain different functions in your game and more!
body:
- **Special Items** that use vanilla functions, remember that I do not recommend changing the name of any item to another name. Some items need their original name to function correctly.
<details>
<summary> ✨  Special Items  ✨ </summary>

# **🕒 Time Lapse (Craft and Function)**
- updated the texture in 1.0.2

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/E2JuPNVNA6Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Alternative Recipe:

![Time Lapse (alternative craft recipe)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e201cf21d1ded93e16e96f00c5f9bf80f073b968.png)

- texture by [sukuro120](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/sukuro120/)

# **✂️ Sticky Shears (Craft and Function)**
- updated the texture in 1.0.2

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xAJAONsoSEs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kV3lDkN8BDw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- texture by [iloveflareon](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/iloveflareon)
- code by [user3991382g](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/user3991382g)

# **🎒 Infinite Bundle Storage (Function and Craft)**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-ObsVra_Un8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![bundle recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11a14c064a86bee0686f7eb9a0b7bf9c816ba810.png)
- code by [user3991382g](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/user3991382g)

# **🛑 Stop Mobs (Function and Craft)**
- updated the texture in 1.0.2

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1VFYZgf8LTg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Alternative recipe:

![Stop Mobs Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/775dc37b0871af04ad702c493fef6ab3a2f16040.png)

# **📦🗝️ Locked Barrel and Key (Function and Craft)**
- updated the key texture in 1.0.2

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uI0mNFGYSYE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- 📦 Locked Barrel Craft

![Locked Barrel (Craft Recipe)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b325189bd6a33ea43d643ad45c0337ec8ffbd6.png)

- 🗝️ Key Craft

![key craft recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee305bf2ca049c9b903802890ef151791daef62a.png)

# **🖼️ Invisible Item Frame and Invisible Glow Item Frame (Function and Craft)**
- new craft in 1.0.1 only.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Wdp6Pd22B4Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **🌎 Compass Counter (Craft and Function)**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xW71YqH51CY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- If you pick up the item in your hand, its coordinates will appear, the number of days that have passed, and the exact time of day/night you are at.
- If you use the /time set day command, it will reset the day count.
- texture by [sukuro120](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/sukuro120/)

# **🎆 Rainbow Firework (Craft and Function)**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Sog42u52yKQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- a Custom Rocket Firework.

</details>

- **Special Mobs** that are from Minecraft itself but don't appear in vanilla as easily, or that are only possible through commands, but now you can craft their eggs and spawn them in the world easily.
<details>
<summary> 🧟  Special Mobs  🧟 </summary>

# **Charged Creeper Spawn Egg**

![Charged Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cabf5d18ee212156e6fb98987f81c613a503962.png)

![Charged Creeper Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126db08d79f88219a99ec83bf21b3eeb374c0565.png)
- Explosion Radius: 3 -> 4
- Knockback Resistance: 0% -> 50% (0.5)

# **Killer Bunny Spawn Egg**

![Killer Bunny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c300477d3565a070537f45dc257aa97c2cc4d3f.png)

![Killer Bunny Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2dda02b64526444c5ccaeef93d51f0c145fcb10.png)
- not changes in the behavior for now.

# **Giant Zombie Spawn Egg**

![Giant Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aaa494d012a6eb750eaf0ad2834ce27829c45bf.png)

![Giant Zombie Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28bea90124e686bc0be7569d0d532b6b0c46e959.png)
- not changes in the behavior for now.

# **Illusioner Spawn Egg**

![Illusioner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6b8105df2f0ffbd643bf2a3148392edea5b804b.png)

![Illusioner Spawn Egg Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aab0af407588e85313efb500e23ea3bb80ff0fc3.png)
- not changes in the behavior for now.

# **Skeleton Horse Trap Spawn Egg**

![skeleton-horse-trap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ace6dcd70659823e9d0eac02726de1dbd35c7166.png)

![Skeleton Horse Trap Spawn Egg Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc4b425f802dd8801eba2a9cf04bd875208f863b.png)
- not changes in the behavior for now.

# **Snow Fox Spawn Egg**

![Snow Fox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be876ade97871be66adbe458eb04b2bc02a8f229.png)

![Snow Fox Spawn Egg Craft Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebba017713ddd42f1bb6ea3f0532d7a604900074.png)
- not changes in the behavior for now.

</details>

- **Special Functions** that work together with vanilla Minecraft, to make your experience even better, without damaging your game.
<details>
<summary> 📈  Special Functions (util)  📈 </summary>
  
# **Bucket in Cauldron**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3PuPiJIYY34" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- If the cauldron is filled with liquid(water, lava and powder snow), you can drop the bucket on top of it, which will automatically fill it with the liquid contents.

# **Mob Head & Player Head Drop if die (Add-on)**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AUeZ5doPD6I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- MOB HEAD Chance: 0.05% - 0.5% - 1.0%
- PLAYER HEAD Chance: 100%

# **Creative Mode - One Hit Kill**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pi0f_KY0ePg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- You can Kill any mob with one Hit in Creative Mode.

# **Item Frame Color (Add-on) by Kikipunk**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wp-BasrF_iY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- You can paint the item frames with dye of any color, you just need to have the dye in hand, crouch and interact with the frame.
- To remove the color, you can break the frame or interact by crouching with a bucket of water in it.
- CREDITS: [Kikipunk](https://modrinth.com/user/kikipunk) and Daminator4113

# **Armor Stand - Arms**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TeUmwWTTqUM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- Drop 2 sticks in Armor Stand to add Arms to he.

# **Item Timer Counter**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cfhOmVsQ7qI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- When you drop an item or it falls from somewhere, a counter will appear above it, if the counter reaches zero, the item will disappear.

</details>


- **Special Books** Custom books that you can craft, each one can do something different
example: Spell Book, Master Spell Book, Armor Stand Manipulation, etc...


<details>
<summary>📖 Special Books 📖</summary>

  # **Master Spell Book**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7NjR0EIxoAk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  # **Teleport Book (for OP only)**

 - texture by: [Bold Muddy](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bold_muddy/)

  # **Book of Cursed Skulls**

  # **Book of Effects**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MLvC2oQhoBM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  # **Jumpscare Book**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VUlLHSwUu1A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

  # **Killing Book**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3fG7CMYOJ3o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# SOME BOOK TEXTURES CREDITS:
- Book of Cursed skulls, Book of Effects, Jumpscare Book, Killing Book and More: [Husker98](https://www.youtube.com/@Husker9898/)  /  [PAGE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/academia-books-optifine/)
- Teleport Book Texture: [Bold Muddy](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bold_muddy/)  /  [PAGE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/earth-s-journal/)


</details>



## **Resource pack(Required) :**

- You Need to "extract for [resource pack name]" in 'resourcepacks' folder in .minecraft

## **Future plans:**
- _Downgrade to: Pickaxe, Shovel, Hoe._
- _Downgrade to: All Armors._
- _Uninstall function._ (implemented in version 1.0.2)
- _More Craft Recipes._
- _More Special Items._
- _More Special Mobs._








<details>
<summary>F.A.Q ❓</summary>

- ### **Works on Multiplayer?**
  - yes, and all add-ons too. (i tested it with my gf, thanks love.)


- ### **How to uninstall the Datapack? (in version 1.0.2 or above)**
  - use: /function maat:uninstall


- ### **I can use this datapack in my server?**
  - yes, if you want.


- ### **I really need the Resource Pack?**
  - yes. (all the custom items have custom texture)


- ### **Can you add such a feature?**
  - yes, but if it's something outside my knowledge or the limitations of the datapacks, no.


- ### **Did you make the textures for the items?**
  - some yes, others no, all the necessary credits are here on the Datapack page or within the **credits.txt** file


</details>
